title: Chat Overhaul !
description: Chat Overhaul adds custom chat formatting, 100+ emojis, @mentions, and more to Minecraft's chat system.
body:
![Veack's Chat Overhaul logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29527e1e23dfe8798c2109f4c867b46758e27e02.png)

> Chat Overhaul modernizes Minecraft's chat system with configurable chat formatting and color, 100+ vanilla looking emojis, a mention system, user-defined aliases, and a tab system to quickly swap between general, team, and whisper chats, completly client-side !

## Features

### Chat Tabs

Using whispers or teammsg commands will automatically send you to the corresponding tab.

![The player typing "/w Miriuc" in the chat, being sent in the whisper tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/715c8df9606ccbccfeaf7935c78907ab80263c6d.gif)

Pressing tab will also allow to quickly swap between tabs.

![The player swapping between tabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9c73a88144e3d86ea069edb7ab31911496b54f6.gif)

### Configurable message formats

You can customize chat messages format to your hearts content ! Using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) on Fabric, or NeoForge default mod menu, you can configure message formats and colors per channel, with timestamps and more !

![![Example of custom aliases in the config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/823c2e73bf628b39416ead3bbc1e0c0f8f871ba6_0.webp)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03cb1ec97dd6b1aa9840c1eb37a62cf4da394773_0.webp)

![3 examples of message format (simple, with 12H format timestamp, and 24H format)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50683df7bc7e68647c2cfe4edb538b9ed45fcf69_0.webp)

### Mentions
**@mentions** are colored in chat, and play a sound if someone is mentionning you. 
(Tip : by clicking on mentions, you can quickly whisper to someone !)

![Mentions and pings example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bdcce8a6ed0886b32e900e76781fac159df2e8d2_0.webp)

### Emojis !
`:name:` codes are substituted with emojis. For now, the mod is adding around 100 emojis, with plans for more in the future !

- The chat input includes emoji suggestions

![Example of emoji suggestions](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f59d520e37b946e11991b313e7ee41b8853c6f3_0.webp)

- And an emoji picker !

![The emoji picker opened, showing a list of emojis sorted by categories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b87713cdf5696fc796b66dd74bf024a50b433f78_0.webp)

### Aliases
You can also add text remplacements in the mod config.

![Example of custom aliases in the config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/54e9eb5fea3765f4fec7ac461524dd99ab8ed965_0.webp)

![Example of alias (from +1 to :thumbs_up:)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17706eea33241e4fe37adb5912c9679a4e79c223.gif)

## Credits

Feel free to add this mod to your modpack !
Please credit me and don't distribute this mod as yours.
